home.editorial1Headline: Made in Michoacán, for all of Mexico.
home.editorial1Body: We are a family lab in Los Reyes with over a decade formulating concentrated cleaning products. You buy once, it yields by the liter, and you never run out of your favorite scent.
home.editorial2Headline: Over 250 products for home and business.
home.editorial2Body: From bulk multi-surface to office bathroom dispensers. One catalog, delivered where you need it.

about.title: About
about.headline1: Making cleaning in Los Reyes for a decade.
about.body1: Total Bri began as a family lab for concentrated cleaning products in Michoacán. We make in small batches with owner-led quality control.
about.headline2: Every liter yields. Every scent lasts.
about.body2: A clean home should not cost more. That is why we concentrate our formulas so you buy less product and stretch it for weeks.
about.headline3: Calzada San Juan #33, Los Reyes, Michoacán.
about.body3: Open Monday to Saturday. Message us on WhatsApp to order or visit us.
